title: Plan Canon
sources: README.md: ROM Awakening and RAG infrastructure requirements
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District C
database.sql: Memo and user table schemas for local storage
forom-config.ts: Category and question label mapping
App.tsx: Currency logic and quest reward implementation
resume: The quest "Plan Canon" (C8) is the strategic apex of District C, residing at the intersection of Strategy and the Savoir action on the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. In the architectural framework of Forom, the Savoir tag (8) is specifically reserved for "Canon RAG Data," which represents the highest tier of community knowledge designed for direct ingestion by the future local AI assistant, ROM. Within Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), this quest moves beyond working drafts and strategic debates to establish the definitive, immutable version of the community’s plan. This plan serves as the final set of instructions and logic that will govern the node’s development for the next decade, ensuring the preservation of human community memory. Technically, the "Plan Canon" is stored as a memo in the local PostgreSQL database, linked to Category C and Question 8. This localized storage on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson is central to the project’s data sovereignty mission, ensuring that the community's core strategic intelligence is never exposed to third-party cloud analytics. The software environment, built with React 19 and Vite 7, presents this canonized strategy within a spatial 5x5 viewport, allowing members to navigate the long-term roadmap with high performance. The "Plan Canon" includes the final technical requirements for the Phase 3 Awakening ritual, specifying the exact population thresholds (9 Super-Mods, 50 Mods, 150 Creators) and treasury holdings (twenty-five percent of total wealth) needed to unlock ROM. Economically, completing this quest in V1 rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, contributing to the internal redistribution of purchasing power. The "Creator" role is primarily responsible for this quest, as it requires the production of verified, high-quality content that pushes the mission forward. Once archived, this memo becomes a permanent part of the V1 dataset. In Phase 3, the local RAG engine will digest this "Plan Canon" to provide intelligent, context-aware strategic advice to users. This ensures that the node’s trajectory remains consistent even as members transition, which is vital for projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs pilot. By establishing the strategic canon at C8, the community secures its path toward the global public lobby, transforming a temporary plan into an everlasting structural record. This entry is now finalized. The core of survival is based on our ability to maintain focus and high quality archives. We must protect our history. Forom is the future of human memory preservation protocols.
summary: This quest canonizes the community's strategic plan at coordinate C8, establishing the definitive RAG-ready dataset required for the long-term survival and AI awakening of the node.
